sectors.name: Oil & Gas
sectors.description: Public sector oil refining, marketing, exploration and gas distribution companies in India.
sectors.analyst_note: PSU-heavy sector; margins highly sensitive to crude oil prices and government subsidy policy.

sectors.name: Banking
sectors.description: Public and private sector banks providing retail, corporate and digital banking services.
sectors.analyst_note: Credit growth, NPA trends, CASA ratio and RBI policy rates are major sector drivers.

sectors.name: Information Technology
sectors.description: Software services, cloud computing, consulting and digital transformation companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Revenue largely depends on US and European enterprise spending and currency movement.

sectors.name: Pharmaceuticals
sectors.description: Drug manufacturers, API producers, biotechnology firms and healthcare solution providers.
sectors.analyst_note: USFDA approvals, export demand and domestic healthcare spending strongly impact valuations.

sectors.name: Automobile
sectors.description: Passenger vehicle, commercial vehicle, two-wheeler manufacturers and auto ancillaries.
sectors.analyst_note: EV adoption, rural demand and commodity prices influence profitability.

sectors.name: Renewable Energy
sectors.description: Companies involved in solar, wind, hydro and clean energy generation.
sectors.analyst_note: Government incentives and clean energy transition policies are long-term growth drivers.

sectors.name: FMCG
sectors.description: Fast-moving consumer goods companies producing daily-use products.
sectors.analyst_note: Defensive sector with stable cash flows; rural consumption trends are important indicators.

sectors.name: Telecom
sectors.description: Telecommunication and digital connectivity service providers.
sectors.analyst_note: ARPU growth, 5G rollout and subscriber additions remain key performance metrics.

sectors.name: Metal & Mining
sectors.description: Steel, aluminium, copper, diversified mining and mineral companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Commodity cycles and global demand heavily influence earnings volatility.

sectors.name: Power
sectors.description: Power generation, transmission and distribution companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Infrastructure expansion and rising electricity demand support long-term sector growth.

sectors.name: Capital Goods
sectors.description: Engineering, industrial equipment, heavy machinery and infrastructure solution providers.
sectors.analyst_note: Government capex and manufacturing growth strongly support order books.

sectors.name: Cement
sectors.description: Manufacturers of cement and construction materials.
sectors.analyst_note: Infrastructure spending and real estate activity are major growth catalysts.

sectors.name: Consumer Durables
sectors.description: Appliance, electronics, household equipment and lifestyle product manufacturers.
sectors.analyst_note: Urban demand and premiumization trends are driving revenue growth.

sectors.name: Real Estate
sectors.description: Residential, commercial and mixed-use property developers.
sectors.analyst_note: Interest rates, housing demand and urbanization trends impact sector performance.

sectors.name: Aviation
sectors.description: Airline operators, airport infrastructure and aviation-related service companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Fuel costs and passenger traffic recovery significantly affect profitability.

sectors.name: Insurance
sectors.description: Life, health and general insurance providers offering protection, savings and investment products.
sectors.analyst_note: Premium growth, persistency ratio and solvency margins are major valuation drivers.

sectors.name: Asset Management
sectors.description: Mutual fund houses, wealth managers and investment management companies.
sectors.analyst_note: AUM growth and retail SIP inflows significantly impact revenue visibility.

sectors.name: NBFC & Finance
sectors.description: Non-banking financial companies focused on retail, vehicle, gold and housing financing.
sectors.analyst_note: Asset quality, borrowing costs and loan growth determine profitability.

sectors.name: Chemicals
sectors.description: Specialty, industrial, performance and agrochemical manufacturers.
sectors.analyst_note: Export demand and raw material prices strongly influence margins.

sectors.name: Fertilizers & Agrochemicals
sectors.description: Companies manufacturing fertilizers, pesticides and crop nutrition products.
sectors.analyst_note: Monsoon trends and government subsidy policies remain critical growth factors.

sectors.name: Textiles & Apparel
sectors.description: Textile manufacturers, garment exporters and branded apparel companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Export demand and cotton price fluctuations influence operating margins.

sectors.name: Logistics
sectors.description: Transportation, warehousing, courier and supply-chain solution providers.
sectors.analyst_note: E-commerce growth and infrastructure development support long-term demand.

sectors.name: Railways
sectors.description: Railway infrastructure, wagon manufacturing, engineering and services companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Government railway capex and modernization initiatives drive order inflows.

sectors.name: Defence
sectors.description: Defence manufacturing, aerospace, military equipment and indigenization companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Indigenization and rising defence budgets create strong long-term opportunities.

sectors.name: Shipping & Ports
sectors.description: Port operators, shipping lines and marine logistics companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Global trade volumes and freight rates heavily impact earnings cycles.

sectors.name: Media & Entertainment
sectors.description: Broadcasting, cinema, music, OTT and digital entertainment companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Advertising demand and digital streaming growth shape sector profitability.

sectors.name: Retail
sectors.description: Organized retail chains, fashion and omnichannel consumer businesses.
sectors.analyst_note: Consumption growth and store expansion are major revenue drivers.

sectors.name: Internet & E-Commerce
sectors.description: Digital platform, online marketplace and internet-based consumer businesses.
sectors.analyst_note: User growth, profitability and platform monetization remain key investor focus areas.

sectors.name: Education
sectors.description: Education technology, coaching, training and skill-development companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Digital learning adoption and skill-development demand support long-term expansion.

sectors.name: Healthcare & Hospitals
sectors.description: Hospital chains, diagnostics, pathology labs and healthcare service providers.
sectors.analyst_note: Occupancy rates, medical tourism and healthcare spending drive sector growth.

sectors.name: Quick Commerce & Food Delivery
sectors.description: Online food delivery, instant commerce and QSR platform companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Order growth, delivery efficiency and profitability metrics are closely tracked.

sectors.name: Data Centers & Digital Infrastructure
sectors.description: Digital infrastructure, cloud hosting, networking and data center operators.
sectors.analyst_note: AI adoption and enterprise cloud demand are accelerating infrastructure investments.

sectors.name: Semiconductors & Electronics
sectors.description: Electronics manufacturing services (EMS) and semiconductor ecosystem companies.
sectors.analyst_note: PLI schemes and electronics export growth support sector expansion.

sectors.name: Water & Waste Management
sectors.description: Water treatment, recycling and environmental management companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Urban infrastructure and sustainability initiatives are boosting demand.

sectors.name: Hospitality & Tourism
sectors.description: Hotel chains, resorts, travel agencies and tourism service providers.
sectors.analyst_note: Travel recovery and rising discretionary spending support sector growth.

sectors.name: Gaming & Online Entertainment
sectors.description: Gaming, fantasy sports and online entertainment platform companies.
sectors.analyst_note: User engagement and regulatory developments strongly impact valuations.

sectors.name: Construction & Infrastructure
sectors.description: Infrastructure developers, EPC contractors, road and urban construction firms.
sectors.analyst_note: Government capex and infrastructure pipeline visibility drive growth momentum.

sectors.name: Cables & Electrical Equipment
sectors.description: Electrical wires, cables, switchgear and industrial electrical equipment manufacturers.
sectors.analyst_note: Power infrastructure growth and housing demand support sector expansion.

sectors.name: Paints
sectors.description: Decorative and industrial paint manufacturing companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Crude derivative prices and housing demand affect profitability.

sectors.name: Jewellery & Luxury
sectors.description: Jewellery retailers, luxury watches and premium lifestyle product companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Gold prices and discretionary spending influence sector performance.

sectors.name: Paper & Packaging
sectors.description: Paper, packaging, containers and corrugated board manufacturing companies.
sectors.analyst_note: E-commerce packaging demand and pulp prices drive earnings.

sectors.name: Sugar & Distilleries
sectors.description: Sugar producers, ethanol blending and distillery companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Ethanol policy and sugarcane production trends significantly impact margins.

sectors.name: Marine & Fisheries
sectors.description: Seafood export, aquaculture and marine product companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Export demand and currency movements affect sector profitability.

sectors.name: Printing & Publishing
sectors.description: Publishing, printing, newspaper and educational content companies.
sectors.analyst_note: Advertising and educational content demand shape earnings growth.

sectors.name: Space Technology
sectors.description: Emerging aerospace, satellite technology and space ecosystem companies.
sectors.analyst_note: India's growing private space ecosystem offers strong long-term growth potential.

sectors.name: Infrastructure Finance
sectors.description: Government-backed and specialised financial institutions that lend to power, railway and infrastructure projects.
sectors.analyst_note: Loan book growth, asset quality in project finance and government support are key valuation drivers.

sectors.name: Spirits & Beverages
sectors.description: Alcoholic beverages including whisky, rum, beer, wine and premium spirits manufacturers.
sectors.analyst_note: State excise policy, premiumisation trends and volume growth in IMFL are key sector drivers.
